nasb.text: from the same mouth come both blessing and cursing. My brethren, these things ought not to be this way.

esv.text: From the same mouth come blessing and cursing. My brothers, these things ought not to be so.

cnv.text: 同一張嘴竟然又稱頌主，又咒詛人；我的弟兄們，這是不應該的！

ccb.text: 赞美和咒诅竟然从同一张嘴里发出来。我的弟兄姊妹，这是不应该的！

csbs.text: 颂赞和诅咒从同一张嘴里出来！我的弟兄们，这些事不应该如此！
